faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Pelham Manor?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Pelham Manor range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of ant species. This includes a thorough inspection, targeted treatment, and follow-up service to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Pelham Manor homes?
faqs.answer: Pelham Manor properties frequently experience carpenter ants (which can damage wooden structures), pavement ants, odorous house ants, and occasionally pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly common due to the village's mature trees and older wooden architecture.
